# Bundled tmux License Notices

This directory ships a statically-linked `tmux` binary built from upstream
sources. The license texts below are reproduced verbatim from each upstream
project. Real source URLs and hashes are pinned in `manifest.json`.

The full upstream LICENSE files will be vendored alongside this notice when
PR 3 lands the actual static build.

## tmux — ISC License

Upstream: https://github.com/tmux/tmux

```
Copyright (c) 2007 Nicholas Marriott <nicholas.marriott@gmail.com>

Permission to use, copy, modify, and distribute this software for any
purpose with or without fee is hereby granted, provided that the above
copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND THE AUTHOR DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES
WITH REGARD TO THIS SOFTWARE INCLUDING ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF
MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHOR BE LIABLE FOR
ANY SPECIAL, DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OR ANY DAMAGES
WHATSOEVER RESULTING FROM LOSS OF USE, DATA OR PROFITS, WHETHER IN AN
ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, ARISING OUT
OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.
```

## libevent — BSD 3-Clause

Upstream: https://github.com/libevent/libevent

The full license text will be reproduced from
`libevent-2.1.12-stable/LICENSE` when the static build lands. libevent is
BSD-3-Clause; redistribution requires preserving the upstream copyright
notices and disclaimer.

## ncurses — MIT-style (X11 derivative)

Upstream: https://invisible-island.net/ncurses/

The full license text will be reproduced from `ncurses-6.5/COPYING` when
the static build lands. Allows free use and redistribution with attribution.

## utf8proc — MIT License

Upstream: https://github.com/JuliaStrings/utf8proc

The full license text will be reproduced from `utf8proc-2.10.0/LICENSE.md`
when the static build lands.
